evidence: All 86 milestone_record tests pass (0 failures, 0 ignored)

Amendment fr-10-a35fc4da FIXED: render_completion_journal_details (model.rs:347-374) now emits structured JSON via a CompletionJournalDetailsPayload serde struct instead of comma-delimited strings. The debug_assert! guards are removed because JSON serialization inherently handles delimiters. CompletionJournalDetails::parse (fs.rs:2283-2287) tries JSON first, then falls back to parse_legacy for backward compatibility.

Amendment fr-10-a35fc4da VERIFIED by test: completion_journal_details_support_delimited_identifiers (model.rs:840-863) creates details with project_id='project, one', run_id='run, 1', plan_hash='plan, v2' and verifies correct JSON round-trip.

Amendment fr-10-a35fc4da VERIFIED by test: completion_replay_repairs_legacy_journal_event_with_delimited_identifiers (service.rs:2452-2540) seeds a legacy comma-delimited journal event with identifiers containing commas, replays via update_task_run with backfill metadata, and asserts exactly 1 BeadCompleted event repaired to JSON format with all fields including 'project, one' and 'run, 1' preserved.

Amendment fr-10-a35fc4da VERIFIED: repairable_completion_event (fs.rs:2424-2456) detects legacy 'project=' prefix events that fail JSON parse and replaces them with canonical JSON rendering on repair replay.

Amendment fr-10-9fd118d3 FIXED: append_task_run (fs.rs:2710-2721) now calls canonicalize_entry_for_write(entry, milestone_id) at line 2718 before serializing. canonicalize_entry_for_write (fs.rs:2567-2574) unconditionally sets canonical.milestone_id = Some(milestone_id.to_string()).

Amendment fr-10-9fd118d3 VERIFIED by test: append_task_run_persists_milestone_id_for_new_entries (service.rs:1285-1328) creates a TaskRunEntry with milestone_id: None, calls append_task_run, reads raw NDJSON from disk, and asserts the file contains the milestone_id field.

All prior acceptance criteria remain satisfied: milestone state answers 'what happened to bead X?', controller can update linkage after each run outcome, all new fields are optional for backward compatibility
findings_or_gaps: Both final-review amendments (fr-10-a35fc4da and fr-10-9fd118d3) have been addressed with code changes and regression tests in completion round 11.

The legacy comma-delimited format parser (parse_legacy in fs.rs:2289-2321) remains inherently fragile for identifiers containing ', ' — but this is acceptable because: (a) new writes always use JSON, and (b) the repair path in repairable_completion_event converts legacy entries to JSON on replay even when legacy parsing fails, using the 'project=' prefix as a fallback detector.

AppError::RunStartFailed is still used (service.rs ~line 555) for rejecting non-terminal outcomes in update_task_run, which is semantically a finalization rejection. A more specific error variant would be cleaner but this is cosmetic, not a correctness issue — carried forward from prior reviews.

The outstanding risk — milestone mutations span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction — remains. All paths are serialized by the milestone mutation lock and replay-safe, making this an acceptable trade-off for file-based storage.
